heading: Annual report of plan administrator
label: 1365 Annual report of plan administrator

children.text: a copy of each notification required under with respect to such year,section 1363 of this title

a statement disclosing whether any reportable event (described in section 1343(b) of this title) occurred during the plan year except to the extent the corporation waives such requirement, and1See References in Text note below.1

children.label: i
children.text: the value of all vested benefits under the plan as of the end of the plan year, and

children.label: ii
children.text: the value of the plan’s assets as of the end of the plan year;

children.label: B
children.text: a statement certified by the plan sponsor of each claim for outstanding withdrawal liability (within the meaning of ) and its value as of the end of that plan year and as of the end of the preceding plan year; andsection 1301(a)(12) of this title

children.label: C
children.text: the number of employers having an obligation to contribute to the plan and the number of employers required to make withdrawal liability payments.
